feed.title: SAP Community - SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud
feed.subtitle: SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Using EPPM projects created before the change in accounting principles to ledgers
entry.content:
Our project is scheduled for GoLive in two weeks, and we have decided to switch the accounting principles of the ledger according to the contents of this blog(SAP Recommendation: Assignment of Corporate Accoun... - SAP Community).

What I would like to know is whether or not the EPPM projects (around 9,000) that were already migrated (before swapping the ledger accounting principle) in the production system can/should not be used after swapping the ledger accounting principle (after transferring over customizations).
No transaction data (journal entry data) has yet been registered in the production system (otherwise it would be impossible to switch the accounting principles of the ledger).
If already registered EPPM projects become unusable, the transition schedule will need to be significantly revised, which will have a huge impact on GoLive in two weeks.

I would like to know as soon as possible whether I can use the EPPM project or not.
I would be very grateful if any experts could answer my question.

entry.title: What's the major difference between odata and S/4hana Conection in SAP Analytics cloud?
entry.content: I am trying to access a custom CDS view on the S/4HANA public cloud using SAC. I noticed that both OData and S/4HANA connections can be used to access the custom CDS view. Could someone explain the differences between these two methods? Also, which method is generally recommended for accessing custom CDS views?

entry.title: Change log for customer, vendor, and associate master data changes
entry.content:
Need to know which App or CDS view to use to get a report to see the change logs for business partners, customer, suppliers and associated master. This requirement came from Auditors


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Is it really impossible to assign the same sales group to multiple sales offices in SAP CBC?
entry.content:
Hello!

I would like to ask a question regarding Sales offices and Sales groups in SAP CBC.

We are currently working on completing the organisational structure in CBC and faced with an issue that we are not able to assign the same sales group to multiple sales offices.

We would like to know if it is really impossible as multiple assignment is needed for our case.

Best Regards,

Fujita

entry.title: How to register Bank Account ID
entry.content:
There is no "Bank Account ID" in the API settings. Please tell me how to set it.

This is the API information in question.

DebtorItem | SAP Help Portal

entry.title: how to copy a flavor from one t-code to another t-code?
entry.content: i have created a flavor for migo t-code. I want the same  flavor for MM01 too. Is there any possibilities to copy a one flavor from one t-code to another directly? SAP Screen Personas SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

entry.title: How to Develop Adobe Forms in SAP S/4 Private Edition like Public Edition through Binding Fields?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts!

Is it feasible to develop Adobe forms in SAP S/4 Hana Private Edition through Binding Fields(XML) similar to how we do in SAP S/4 Hana Public Edition?

It would be grateful if you could help me with steps needs to be followed for development of Adobe Forms in Private Edition.

Thanks,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: Linking Project WBS to Timesheets in the "Manage My Timesheet" App
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I need to understand how to link the project WBS to the timesheet in the "Manage My Timesheet" app.

Attached Screen shot for your Reference. 

Thanks and Regards,

SMK Ganesh

entry.title: S/4HANA Public Cloud outbound SOAP call SalesOrderBulkErrorLog_Out
entry.content:
Hi, 

I am creating sales order in S/4HANA Public Cloud from EDI message via CPI using SOAP message SalesOrderBulkRequest_In (SAP_COM_0288). This interface is working as expected. Link to business accelerator hub.

Now, I want to capture the errors in CPI through an outbound call from S/4HANA system via SalesOrderBulkErrorLog_Out under the same communication scenario. Link

I have created the communication user and enabled the outbound service in communication arrangement.

 

Configured an iFow in CPI with the endpoint specified in communication arrangement:

 

But, still the iflow is not triggered and 302 (redirect) error is displayed in message monitoring app.

 

Is there any specific setting I am missing? Could you please help?

Regards,

Anupam

entry.title: How to delete components in a planned order manually?
entry.content:
Hi,

Is there a way to remove components in planned order level?

In "Component overview" mode I can only change existing BOM and in "Collective Entry" mode only add new components.

How I can remove a component from planned order?

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Tcode F-90 / App with the same funtionality in SAP Public Cloud
entry.content:
Hello experts!

Could you please clarify to me if in SAP Public cloud there is some app same as tcode F-90 in onpremise implementation?.
My client does not have logistic module implementation but only FI module and I´m wondering if there is any app that can make aposting vendor against fixed asset?

Thanks!

entry.title: How to hide Custom field in Billing Document item based on condition in SAP S/4 Hana Public Edition?
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts!

How to hide custom fields in Billing Document Item based on Condition? Same requirement i had in Sale order screen and achieved it through BADI. But i don't see similar BADI released for billing document to set properties of custom fields to Invisible / mandatory / read-only?

It would be grateful if you could help me in hiding custom fields in billing document item level.

Thanks,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: CDS views for Public cloud to the stock.
entry.content:
we are unable to find the some stock CDS views.

  1. Stock for plant level
  2. Customer Stock transfer plant
  3. In transit Stock.

 

so, please anybody know about the CDS view so kindly help me.

entry.title: Custom fields flow from Sale order to Purchase Requisition and Purchase Order
entry.content:
Hi SAP Experts!

I have created few custom fields in Sale order item level, and i wanted those to flow to Purchase requisition and Purchase order in SAP S4HANA Public Edition.

I checked in Business Scenarios Tab while creating custom fields but unable to find PR and PO to enable.

It would be grateful if you could help me.

Thanks,

Sai Bhargav

entry.title: APP 'Manage Material Valuations' shows inventory value zero for products valuated at MAP
entry.content:
Hi,

The app 'Manage Material Valuations' shows inventory value zero for products valued at moving average price although there's a total stock value and stock quantity. Why is the inventory value shown as zero?

You would expect the inventory price to be total stock value / stock quantity in this case.

Thanks in advance for your support,
Jonathan

entry.title: How to call public cloud SAP API from embedded steampunk?
entry.content:
After days of reading documentation, blogs and tutorials... I'm still no step further in what I was expecting to be a pretty straight-forward scenario. I must be missing something obvious, but what?

On our S/4HANA Public Edition development system, I have created an application job to automatically create credit memos. Works like a charm, up until the moment that I actually need to create the credit memo. Of course we want to use the available public API to do so.

There is a default communication arrangement for this API (SAP_COM_0158), which has INBOUND services linked. Makes sense, since I want to call this service to create the credit memo in SAP. That sounds indeed like an inbound interface. It should not matter whether I call it from an actual external system (like BTP) or in this case from the embedded ABAP environment. As far as S/4 is concerned, it is inbound.

This tutorial seems to come closest to what I want to achieve:
Implement an Outbound Service Call in SAP BTP, ABAP environment for an OData Service via Service Consumption Model 

Several components are required to make this work. We have a communication scenario ZCS_CREDIT_MEMO, in which I point to outbound service ZOBS_CREDIT_MEMO_REST. Then there is the consumption model ZCM_CREDIT_MEMO, based on the EDMX file from the business hub. It provides me with example code.

To get the destination, static method CREATE_BY_COMM_ARRANGEMENT is being called. Following the tutorial, I enter the communication scenario and the outbound service. This results in an exception. Apparently not the values SAP is expecting. I've tried several combinations of objects, so far nothing works.

DATA(lo_destination) = cl_http_destination_provider=>create_by_comm_arrangement(
                                             comm_scenario  = 'ZCS_CREDIT_MEMO'
                                             service_id     = 'ZOBS_CREDIT_MEMO_REST' ).

In the debugger I can see the query to retrieve the communication arrangements uses table aps_ca_d_root as a basis. Unfortunately, this being public cloud, I cannot view the contents of that table to see what is actually there. That would be helpful in finding what I should provide the method.

In case I enter the communication arrangement as 'comm_scenario', the system does find the communication arrangement itself, but then filters on available outbound services. Which it does not have, since it's meant for inbound. Once again, no result, which results in the exception.

This has to be incredibly basic. What step am I missing here? Thanks in advance for the help!

entry.title: Revenue Recognition - Cost-Based Percentage of Completion Methods with different WBS
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

 

I created a revenue project and assigned a recognition key (EPMFC) in contract type. 

 

Eg. Project name - R.RPJ.1

Revenue Plan WBS - R.RPJ.11 .001 >> 1000 SGD

Cost Plan WBS - R.RPJ.12 .001 >> 700 SGD

We have uploaded the financial plan data into SAP. And also posted cost journal entries, opened the sales order and billing posted to accounting as well.

When we run the revenue recognition (with these two different WBS), we got the error and couldn't run successfully. The question is can we run the cost-based revenue recognition with different WBS? 

Note: When I ran with same WBS code, it was successfully completed and generate RR documents correctly.

 

It would be appreciated if you answer my question.

 

Best Regards,

Phoo

entry.title: About using custom fonts in custom form templates
entry.content:
I would like to know how to set a custom font in a custom template using the "Embed PDF" property.
I have already uploaded the custom font to Adobe Document Services (ADS). It is also installed on my Windows machine.
Are there any restrictions on custom fonts?

I would also like to know how to set a custom form template in a specified report.

Thank you in advance.

SAP Forms service by Adobe 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition 

SAP S/4HANA Cloud Extensibility 

NW ABAP Print and Output Management

entry.title: Client copy
entry.content:
Hi Team,

Please let us know the steps to copy master and transactional data from one client to another client in S4 hana public cloud. will implementing our S4hana tenant we had opted for demo data, we only get one client is it, when we opt for demo data?? 

 Regards,

Bharath.G

entry.title: Custom field from Service order doesn't get filled for Sales Order
entry.content:
Hi,

We have a requirement, that Service order header custom field value should be taken over to Sales order header. I used this business scenario, however the value stays empty for this field in VBAK table. What is wrong?

I am using Search service order application (TBT116MSR) for creation and editing of the ser. orders.

Thanks
